heading: Payment of residents for services
label: 421 Payment of residents for services
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (b)(1), was repealed by , , .Section 5532 of title 5Pub. L. 106–65, div. A, title VI, § 651(a)(1)113 Stat. 664Oct. 5, 1999

Amendments2001—Subsec. (a). substituted “Chief Operating Officer” for “Chairman of the Armed Forces Retirement Board”.Pub. L. 107–1071996—Subsec. (b)(2). amended par. (2) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (2) read as follows: “being an employee of the United States for any other purpose.”Pub. L. 104–201

Forgiveness of Indebtedness, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–484, div. A, title III, § 385(b)106 Stat. 2394Oct. 23, 1992“The Chairman of the Armed Forces Retirement Board is authorized to cancel the indebtedness of any resident of the Armed Forces Retirement Home for repayment to the United States of amounts paid the resident for services provided to the Retirement Home before the date of the enactment of this Act [] if the Chairman determines that it would be in the interest of the United States to do so and against equity and good conscience to require the repayment.”Oct. 23, 1992

children.heading: Authority
children.label: a Authority
children.text: The Chief Operating Officer is authorized to accept for the Armed Forces Retirement Home the part-time or intermittent services of a resident of the Retirement Home, to pay the resident for such services, and to fix the rate of such pay.
receiving the pay of a position or being employed in a position for the purposes of section 5532 of title 5; or1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: A
children.text: subchapter I of chapter 81 of title 5 (relating to compensation for work-related injuries); and

children.label: B
children.text: chapter 171 of title 28 (relating to claims for damages or loss).

children.heading: “Position” defined
children.label: c “Position” defined
children.text: In subsection (b)(1), the term “position” has the meaning given that term in .section 5531 of title 5
